title: The Rake Remastered UPD 1.6.5
description: He hunts you at night and sleeps in his cave in the morning. He comes out at night and smells his victims and hunts them secretly. Build an underground shelter to avoid dying against the Rake and stay alive ;)
body:
Title
Search for Minecraft mods...
NEW UPDATE: SOUNDS AND OTHER MINOR BUGS FIXED 




Home
Minecraft
Mods
Rake

What is Rake?
Rake is a humanoid creature that roams your world and will do anything

Its power is enough to finish you, stay inside or it's all over for you

It will follow you for long periods of time and attack you

With precision to end your life as quickly as possible.

Rake is also known to be extremely hostile and aggressive
towards its prey and victims. Rake seems to be quite intelligent, it usually follows its victims
It follows them for a long time and attacks them with its incredible speed and sharp claws

Extra İtems: Stun Rod Super Stun Rod Tracker Super Tracker Music Disk Cave Block Cave Move Cave stone with claws Rake Trap Rake Vest Rake Spawn Egg

Extra Detail: Rake's Cave Will Spawn As Soon As You Create The World 

This Mod Works With Geckolib Reason: For It To Work Properly 

Mods to Install on True Dark Fog Harassment Weapon Mod

TESTİNG 
VİDEO:https://youtube.com/shorts/EhpJRlBSJh4?si=cl3DPrA4LGALA0XB

Thank you for your
understanding.
